children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Commission shall convene joint boards on a regional basis pursuant to to study the issue of security constrained economic dispatch for the various market regions. The Commission shall designate the appropriate regions to be covered by each such joint board for purposes of this section.section 824h of this title

children.heading: Membership
children.label: b Membership
children.text: The Commission shall request each State to nominate a representative for the appropriate regional joint board, and shall designate a member of the Commission to chair and participate as a member of each such board.

children.heading: Powers
children.label: c Powers
children.text: The sole authority of each joint board convened under this section shall be to consider issues relevant to what constitutes “security constrained economic dispatch” and how such a mode of operating an electric energy system affects or enhances the reliability and affordability of service to customers in the region concerned and to make recommendations to the Commission regarding such issues.

children.heading: Report to the Congress
children.label: d Report to the Congress
children.text: Within 1 year after , the Commission shall issue a report and submit such report to the Congress regarding the recommendations of the joint boards under this section and the Commission may consolidate the recommendations of more than one such regional joint board, including any consensus recommendations for statutory or regulatory reform.August 8, 2005
